ddls:
CREATE TABLE "children" (
  "child_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each child */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the child */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the child */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the child */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the child */,
  "birth_location" TEXT /* Location of birth */,
  "mother_id" INTEGER /* ID of the child's mother */,
  "father_id" INTEGER /* ID of the child's father */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study the child is part of */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the child */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the child */,
  "birth_weight" REAL /* Birth weight of the child */,
  "birth_length" REAL /* Birth length of the child */,
  "gestational_age" INTEGER /* Gestational age at birth */,
  "apgar_score_1min" INTEGER /* Apgar score at 1 minute */,
  "apgar_score_5min" INTEGER /* Apgar score at 5 minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("child_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_children_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_children_mother_id FOREIGN KEY ("mother_id") REFERENCES parents ("parent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_children_father_id FOREIGN KEY ("father_id") REFERENCES parents ("parent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "studies" (
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each study */,
  "study_name" TEXT /* Name of the study */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the study */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the study */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the study is conducted */,
  "principal_investigator" TEXT /* Principal investigator of the study */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the study */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding for the study */,
  "research_design" TEXT /* Research design (e.g., observational, experimental) */,
  "sample_size" INTEGER /* Number of participants in the study */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the study (e.g., ongoing, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parents" (
  "parent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parent */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the parent */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the parent */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the parent */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the parent */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the parent */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the parent */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the parent */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Highest level of education completed by the parent */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the parent */,
  "income_level" TEXT /* Income level of the parent */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the parent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "variables" (
  "variable_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each variable */,
  "variable_name" TEXT /* Name of the variable */,
  "variable_label" TEXT /* Label of the variable */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the variable (e.g., Child characteristics) */,
  "units" TEXT /* Units of the variable */,
  "variable_type" TEXT /* Type of the variable (e.g., risk factor, outcome) */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the variable (e.g., continuous, categorical) */,
  "minimum_value" REAL /* Minimum possible value of the variable */,
  "maximum_value" REAL /* Maximum possible value of the variable */,
  "description" TEXT /* A more detailed description of the variable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variable_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "child_variables" (
  "child_variable_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each child-variable record */,
  "child_id" INTEGER /* ID of the child */,
  "variable_id" INTEGER /* ID of the variable */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the variable for the child */,
  "measurement_date" TEXT /* Date of measurement */,
  "unit_of_measurement" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the variable value */,
  "measurement_method" TEXT /* Method used to measure the variable */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the measurement (e.g., hospital, home visit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("child_variable_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_child_variables_child_id FOREIGN KEY ("child_id") REFERENCES children ("child_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_child_variables_variable_id FOREIGN KEY ("variable_id") REFERENCES variables ("variable_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_outcomes" (
  "outcome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health outcome */,
  "child_id" INTEGER /* ID of the child */,
  "outcome_name" TEXT /* Name of the health outcome */,
  "outcome_value" TEXT /* Value of the health outcome */,
  "outcome_date" TEXT /* Date of the health outcome */,
  "outcome_type" TEXT /* Type of health outcome (e.g., physical, cognitive) */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the health outcome (e.g., mild, moderate, severe) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the health outcome data (e.g., hospital, clinic) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outcome_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_outcomes_child_id FOREIGN KEY ("child_id") REFERENCES children ("child_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "risk_factors" (
  "risk_factor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each risk factor */,
  "child_id" INTEGER /* ID of the child */,
  "risk_factor_name" TEXT /* Name of the risk factor */,
  "risk_factor_value" TEXT /* Value of the risk factor */,
  "risk_factor_date" TEXT /* Date of the risk factor */,
  "risk_factor_type" TEXT /* Type of risk factor (e.g., environmental, behavioral) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the risk factor data (e.g., survey, medical records) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("risk_factor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_risk_factors_child_id FOREIGN KEY ("child_id") REFERENCES children ("child_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interventions" (
  "intervention_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each intervention */,
  "intervention_name" TEXT /* Name of the intervention */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the intervention */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the intervention */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the intervention */,
  "intervention_type" TEXT /* Type of intervention (e.g., nutritional, educational) */,
  "target_population" TEXT /* Target population for the intervention */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding for the intervention */,
  "outcome_measures" TEXT /* Measures used to evaluate the intervention's effectiveness */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("intervention_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "child_interventions" (
  "child_intervention_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each child-intervention record */,
  "child_id" INTEGER /* ID of the child */,
  "intervention_id" INTEGER /* ID of the intervention */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the intervention for the child */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the intervention for the child */,
  "intervention_status" TEXT /* Status of the intervention (e.g., ongoing, completed) */,
  "reason_for_termination" TEXT /* Reason for termination if the intervention was not completed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("child_intervention_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_child_interventions_intervention_id FOREIGN KEY ("intervention_id") REFERENCES interventions ("intervention_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_child_interventions_child_id FOREIGN KEY ("child_id") REFERENCES children ("child_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "healthcare_facilities" (
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each healthcare facility */,
  "facility_name" TEXT /* Name of the healthcare facility */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the healthcare facility */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the healthcare facility */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the healthcare facility */,
  "facility_type" TEXT /* Type of healthcare facility (e.g., hospital, clinic) */,
  "facility_size" TEXT /* Size of the healthcare facility (e.g., number of beds) */,
  "services_offered" TEXT /* Services offered by the healthcare facility */,
  "quality_rating" TEXT /* Quality rating of the healthcare facility */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "child_facilities" (
  "child_facility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each child-facility record */,
  "child_id" INTEGER /* ID of the child */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the healthcare facility */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of care at the facility */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of care at the facility */,
  "care_type" TEXT /* Type of care provided (e.g., primary care, specialized care) */,
  "reason_for_transfer" TEXT /* Reason for transferring care to another facility */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("child_facility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_child_facilities_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES healthcare_facilities ("facility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_child_facilities_child_id FOREIGN KEY ("child_id") REFERENCES children ("child_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "child_id" INTEGER /* ID of the child whose data was accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of the access event */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_child_id FOREIGN KEY ("child_id") REFERENCES children ("child_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data version */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data (e.g., child_variables, health_outcomes) */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the data */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date of the version */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in this version */,
  "version_status" TEXT /* Status of the data version (e.g., draft, published) */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the data version */,
  "approved_by" TEXT /* User who approved the data version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data version the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of data file (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  "file_checksum" TEXT /* Checksum of the file for integrity verification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES data_versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "readme_files" (
  "readme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each readme file */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data version the readme file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the readme file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the readme file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of readme file (e.g., text, PDF) */,
  "file_checksum" TEXT /* Checksum of the file for integrity verification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("readme_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_readme_files_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES data_versions ("version_id")
)
